pr.title: Record: Packed N-gram + Two-Pass   Dirichlet CTW — val_bpb 0.0830 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Packed order-2-13 n-gram artifact with two-pass rescore and hierarchical Dirichlet CTW mixing lets a warmed cache shoulder most probability work.
techniques: Packed n-gram hash tables preloaded into artifact to warm the cache instantly
Two-pass scoring and rescore reuses the full cache without extra neural forward passes
Hierarchical Dirichlet CTW chains posteriors across orders for principled mixing
